name: document-generator
description: Agent workflow support for Brandon Gottshall's YAML-driven document pipeline.

interface.shortDescription: Generate, validate, export, and archive Brandon's official documents.
interface.longDescription: Repository-local workflow support for Brandon Gottshall's resume, CV, cover-letter, portfolio-export, and tailored job-application document pipeline.
defaultPrompt: Validate and rebuild my official documents.
Draft a tailored cover letter from a job post.
Archive this custom generation run privately.
